allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\steamapps\\common\\Baby Steps\\MelonLoader\\Il2CppAssemblies\\" | Where-Object { $_.Name -match -join\("scene","manag"\) } | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\steamapps\\common\\Baby Steps\\MelonLoader\\Il2CppAssemblies\\Il2CppGPUInstancer.dll"\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); $idx = $text.IndexOf\("GPUInstancer"\); Write-Host "First occurrence at: $idx"; if\($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Host $text.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$idx-20\), 80\) })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\steamapps\\common\\Baby Steps\\MelonLoader\\Il2CppAssemblies\\Il2CppGPUInstancer.dll"\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); $matches2 = [System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex]::Matches\($text, 'GPUInstancer\\b'\); Write-Host "Count: $\($matches2.Count\)"; # Check context around first few for namespace $matches2 | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "--- at $\($_.Index\)"; Write-Host $text.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$_.Index-30\), 80\) })
